request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Vinted Products Scraper**. Each record represents one marketplace listing.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | integer | Unique identifier for this result record. |
| **object** | string | Always `"result"`. |
| **squid** | string | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result. |
| **run** | string | Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped. |
| **badge** | string or null | Special badge or label on the listing (e.g., “New”, “Sale”). |
| **brand_title** | string or null | Brand name of the item, if provided. |
| **content_source** | string | Source type of the content (e.g., `"catalog"`). |
| **conversion** | number or null | Conversion metric or rate, if available. |
| **currency** | string or null | Currency code for price fields (e.g., `"€"`). |
| **description** | string or null | Text description of the item, if provided. |
| **discount** | number or null | Discount percentage applied to the base price. |
| **favourite_count** | integer | Total number of users who have favorited this item. |
| **favourite_group_id** | string or null | Identifier of the favorites group, if the item is grouped. |
| **functions** | object or null | Reserved for any function-specific metadata (currently `null`). |
| **image_dominant_color** | string or null | Hex code of the image’s dominant color, if computed. |
| **image_url** | string or null | URL of the item’s main image. |
| **internal_id** | string | Internal Vinted listing identifier. |
| **is_favourite** | boolean | `true` if the current user has favorited this item. |
| **is_for_swap** | boolean or null | `true` if the item is marked as available for a swap instead of purchase. |
| **is_visible** | boolean | `true` if the listing is publicly visible. |
| **native_id** | integer | Native numeric ID matching the listing. |
| **price** | number | Listing price in the specified currency. |
| **promoted** | boolean | `true` if the listing is promoted (paid placement). |
| **scraping_time** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when this result was fetched (e.g., `"2025-01-29T09:35:41.930Z"`). |
| **service_fee** | number | Platform service fee added to the base price. |
| **size_title** | string or null | Size label for apparel (e.g., `"S / 36 / 8"`). |
| **status** | string or null | Current listing status (e.g., `"sold"`, `"reserved"`), if provided. |
| **title** | string | Headline or title of the item. |
| **total_item_price** | number | Sum of `price` + `service_fee`. |
| **url** | string | Direct URL to the Vinted listing. |
| **user_business** | boolean | `true` if the seller is registered as a business. |
| **user_id** | string | Unique identifier of the seller. |
| **user_is_hidden** | boolean or null | `true` if the seller’s identity is hidden. |
| **user_is_sus** | boolean or null | `true` if the seller is flagged as suspicious. |
| **user_login** | string | Seller’s Vinted username. |
| **user_orientation** | string or null | Seller’s listed orientation or preference, if any. |
| **user_photo_url** | string or null | URL of the seller’s profile photo. |
| **user_profile_url** | string | Direct URL to the seller’s Vinted profile page. |
| **view_count** | integer | Number of times this listing has been viewed. |

response.name: Example
